'''''Nightcast''''' was a [[Stalwart-class light freighter|''Stalwart''-class freighter]] originally owned by [[Karu Nelbin]].

==History==

Nelbin was killed by professional [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Callandri]], who decided to keep Nelbin's ship for herself. She modified the ship, replacing many of the components with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military designs. She usually kept her ground vehicle, a [[Q-6100|Jadai Q-6100]], in the ship's hold.<ref name="AIR" />

Callandri used the ''Nightcast'' as one of the three ships of the [[Granse Confederacy]], alongside the ''[[Mist Laden]]'' and the ''[[Waterspire]]''.<ref name="AIR" />
